<svg width="24" height="30" viewBox="-1 0 -56 -87">
    <!-- Bus Body -->
    <path d="
        M-9,-2 L-12,-1 C-12,-1 -13,-1 -13,-1 
        Q-13,-1 -13,-1 T-13,-1 Z"
          fill="#FFD700"/>
    
    <!-- Windows and Doors -->
    <circle cx=-12 cy=0 r=2 />
    <circle cx=-12+12*sqrt(3)/2 cy=sqrt(-3/2)*r r=r/>
    <line x1=-12 y1=0 x2=-12+12*r y2=r>
      stroke:#fff;
      opacity:.5;  
    </line>

    <!-- Wheels -->
    <ellipse rx=5 ry=10 transform='translate(-12,-1)' style='#ff4b4b'/>
</svg>
